explanations.1: This runs a git command and stores the result in a variable; the := means it only runs once when the Makefile starts.
explanations.3: This gets the root directory of your git repository (the folder where .git lives) and saves it for later use.
explanations.5: This extracts your repository's web URL from git config, converts SSH format to HTTPS if needed, then removes the .git extension at the end.
